title: Multi Plug Extension Socket with 4 USB (2 Type C), ANVODE 4 Way Plug Adaptor with Short Cable, Adapter Plug UK Turn 1 to 8, Short Extension Lead Power Strip for Bedroom, Office, Kitchen. White
features: 8-in-1 Wall Plug Adapter: This multi plug adaptor features 4 AC outlets and 4 USB ports, it supports a maximum capacity of up to 3250 Watts (250 Volts, 13 A). This 8-in-1 plug multi socket efficiently expands your charging options while protecting your devices.

Rapid USB Charging: The wall extension plug includes 2 USB-A ports and 2 USB-C ports, providing fast charging for mobile devices like phones, tablets, and cameras. The total USB output is 5V/3.4A, with each USB-C port offering up to 3A and each USB-A port offering up to 2.4A.

Flexible Short Extension Cable: The short, pliable cord can twist, swing, and bend, making it highly flexible. This short cable design ensures it does not interfere with neighboring sockets or switches, only 5cm long cords allows you to stop worrying about messy wires on the floor.

Surge Protected Extension Lead: The built-in 350 Joules surge protector safeguards your home or office electronics from power disturbances, even during thunderstorms, ensuring your devices are protected from voltage spikes.

Space-Saving Design: Measuring just 21 x 21 x 4 cm, this 4 gang extension lead takes up minimal space. It's perfect for use on walls, desks, nightstands, or any other location, making it an essential accessory for the office, kitchen, or bedroom.
